---
title: ""
---

::: {.hero}
# Briana Maximino  
### Marketing Strategy | Sports Marketing | Brand Experience  

I explore how brands build cultural relevance through strategy, experience design, and audience behavior insights.

<a href="projects.html" class="btn-primary">View Projects</a>
:::

## About  

I am a marketing student focused on understanding how organizations create meaningful audience engagement through strategic thinking and experiential marketing concepts.  

My interests include sports marketing, brand positioning, and consumer behavior analysis.

---

## Focus Areas  

- Sports Marketing Strategy  
- Brand Experience & Engagement  
- Consumer Behavior Insights  
- Campaign Development  
- Experiential Marketing  

---

## Skills  

- Marketing Strategy  
- Market Research  
- Campaign Planning  
- Brand Positioning  
- Google Analytics (GA4)  
- Excel & Data Analysis  
- Social Media Strategy  

---

## Portfolio Overview  

This portfolio presents marketing strategy projects exploring brand engagement, experiential campaigns, and organizational positioning within contemporary digital environments.

---

*This portfolio reflects ongoing development in marketing strategy, creative thinking, and real-world application.*
